Ashwagandha + Magnesium Gummies

Ingredients
What's Inside & Why It Works
Read this before scripting. When you understand the mechanism, your content sounds genuine — and genuine converts.
Ashwagandha
Withania Somnifera — Adaptogenic root used 3,000+ years in Ayurvedic medicine
Ashwagandha is an adaptogen — it helps your body physically adapt to stress. It works by regulating cortisol (your primary stress hormone). Chronic high cortisol wrecks everything: sleep, testosterone, libido, body composition, mental clarity. Ashwagandha brings cortisol back into balance, triggering a cascade of positive effects across your entire biology.
Lowers cortisolSupports testosteronePromotes calmSupports enduranceSupports libidoMental clarityThyroid supportAnti-inflammatory
27%Reduction in cortisol in clinical studies
17%Average testosterone increase in men
3,000Years of documented use
8 wksTypical time to notice full effects
Magnesium
Essential mineral — involved in 300+ enzymatic reactions
Over 70% of adults don't get enough magnesium — yet it's required for energy production, muscle contraction, nerve signaling, blood sugar balance, and hormone synthesis. Pairing it with Ashwagandha is powerful because both target the same systems (sleep, stress, hormones) through completely different pathways. The combined effect is significantly stronger than either alone.
Deep sleep supportMuscle recoveryPromotes calmEnergy productionHeart healthBlood sugar balanceBone densityTestosterone support
70%Adults estimated deficient
300+Enzymatic reactions requiring Mg
↑ TDirectly required for testosterone synthesis
REMClinically supports deep sleep cycles
Withanolides
Active biocompounds in Ashwagandha — the engine behind the effects
Withanolides are the bioactive compounds that make Ashwagandha work. Structurally similar to natural steroids, they bind to hormone receptors, reduce inflammation at the cellular level, and protect neurons from stress-related damage. Higher withanolide content = stronger, faster results. This is why extract quality matters — KSM-66 is the gold standard.
NeuroprotectiveHormonal regulationAnti-inflammatoryCellular repairReceptor bindingKSM-66 extract
5%+Withanolide content in quality extracts
KSM-66Most studied & bioavailable form
↓ NF-κBSuppresses inflammatory pathway
CNSProtects nervous system under stress
Creator Strategy
How to Promote — Her vs Him
Your audience shapes your angle. Pick your gender tab and get the exact benefits, pain points, and script hooks tailored for that audience.
😰

Stress & Hormonal Balance

Women's hormones are heavily disrupted by chronic stress. Ashwagandha supports cortisol regulation which directly helps balance estrogen and progesterone — leading to more stable energy, better mood, and reduced PMS symptoms.

😴

Sleep & Recovery

Magnesium is one of the most effective natural sleep supporters for women — especially during hormonal shifts (cycle phases, perimenopause). Promotes deeper, more restorative sleep without grogginess.

🌸

Libido & Intimacy

Ashwagandha is clinically shown to improve sexual function scores in women — specifically arousal, lubrication, and satisfaction. Cortisol reduction helps women feel more present and connected with their partner.

🧠

Focus & Brain Fog

Magnesium deficiency is a leading and widely overlooked cause of brain fog, especially in women. Supports mental clarity, reduces overwhelm, and helps with that "scattered" feeling many women experience under stress.

⚡

Sustainable Energy

Unlike caffeine, Ashwagandha supports energy at the root level by reducing the cortisol drain. No spike, no crash — just steady, calm energy throughout the day. Great angle for busy moms, entrepreneurs, and career women.

🌿

PCOS & Cycle Support

Ashwagandha has been shown to support hormonal regularity, which is beneficial for women with PCOS or irregular cycles. Frame carefully — use "supports hormonal balance" not "treats PCOS."

Top Performing Hooks for Female Creators

Use these as openers or riff on them:

"I've been stressed, exhausted, and my cycle was all over the place — turns out my cortisol was doing the most."
"This is the one supplement I actually wish someone had told me about earlier as a woman."
"Ladies — if you're tired, foggy, and your mood is all over the place, this might be why."
"My sleep, skin, and energy completely changed when I started supporting my cortisol."
"Nobody talks about how stress affects a woman's hormones — here's what I learned."
💪

Natural Testosterone Support

Ashwagandha is backed by clinical studies showing up to 17% increase in testosterone in men. Magnesium is directly required for testosterone synthesis. Together, they support your body's natural hormone production without anything synthetic.

🏋️

Gym Performance & Recovery

Ashwagandha is clinically proven to improve VO2 max and physical endurance. Magnesium reduces muscle fatigue and speeds up recovery. The result: better workouts, faster recovery, more consistent gains.

🔥

Drive & Confidence

High cortisol is the #1 hidden killer of male drive — in the gym, in business, and in the bedroom. Ashwagandha suppresses cortisol, Magnesium calms the nervous system. The combined effect is more energy, more edge, more presence.

😴

Deep Sleep = More Gains

Most testosterone production happens during deep sleep. Magnesium directly supports deep sleep quality. Better sleep = higher T, faster muscle repair, better focus the next day. Frame this as the recovery tool most gym guys overlook.

🧠

Mental Performance

Ashwagandha supports cognitive function under stress, reduces brain fog, and improves reaction time. Great angle for competitive athletes, entrepreneurs, and high-performers who want to operate at 100%.

🌱

Fertility & Reproductive Health

Studies show Ashwagandha supports healthy sperm count, motility, and morphology. Magnesium supports healthy testosterone metabolism. Frame as overall reproductive wellness, not a treatment.

Top Performing Hooks for Male Creators

Use these as openers or riff on them:

"Bro, if you're not recovering properly you're leaving gains on the table. Here's what I added."
"I was tired, low energy, and mentally checked out. Turns out my cortisol was running the show."
"This is the one natural supplement with actual clinical studies behind it. Not just bro science."
"Your testosterone might not be low because of age — it might be because of these two deficiencies."
"Stopped buying overpriced pre-workouts. Here's what I actually take now."

    Sexual & Hormonal Health
    The Intimate Benefits — In Detail
    This angle converts extremely well. Use personal experience framing, avoid explicit claims. See violations guide for safe language.
    🔥

    Supports Healthy T Levels

    Ashwagandha has been shown in studies to support healthy testosterone levels in men — up to 17% in some trials. Magnesium is directly required for testosterone synthesis. Together they support your body's natural production.

    🧠

    Reduces Performance Stress

    High cortisol is the #1 hidden reason people feel disconnected in intimate situations. Ashwagandha suppresses cortisol, Magnesium calms the nervous system — helping you feel present, relaxed, and confident.

    💧

    Supports Drive & Desire

    Both ingredients support healthy dopamine and circulation — foundational to desire and arousal in both men and women. Ashwagandha has been shown to support healthy sexual function in both sexes in clinical studies.

    ⚡

    Stamina & Endurance

    Ashwagandha is clinically proven to improve VO2 max and endurance. Magnesium reduces muscle fatigue and improves ATP energy production. More energy, less fatigue — in every area of life.

    🌸

    Women's Sexual Wellness

    Clinical studies show Ashwagandha supports sexual function scores in women — including arousal and satisfaction. Frame as "supports intimate wellness" not a treatment. Great for female lifestyle creators.

    🌱

    Reproductive Wellness

    Ashwagandha supports healthy sperm parameters in men and hormonal regularity in women. Magnesium supports healthy estrogen metabolism. Frame as overall reproductive wellness support.

    Copy Bank
    Ready-to-Use Hook Lines
    Click any card to copy. All hooks use TikTok-safe language — no banned terms.
    I was tired, running on stress, and had zero energy. Turns out my cortisol was doing the damage.
    The adaptogen your body actually needs — and 70% of people are missing the mineral it's paired with.
    3,000 years of Ayurvedic medicine, now in a gummy. And the science actually backs it up.
    This is what happens when you finally support your magnesium levels.
    I stopped blaming stress and started doing something about it. Here's what changed.
    Your body can't produce testosterone without this mineral. Most men are deficient in it.
    Added this to my nighttime routine. My sleep hasn't been the same since — in the best way.
    Not a stimulant. Not a hormone. Just your body working the way it was designed to.
    Replaced my 3pm coffee. Genuinely didn't expect the difference.
    Nobody talks about what stress actually does to your body long-term. Here's the honest version.
    Creator Guidelines
    Do's & Don'ts
    Stay on the right side of TikTok's policies and keep content authentic.

    ✅ Do This

    • →Speak from personal experience ("I felt...", "I noticed...")
    • →Use "supports", "promotes", "may help" — never "treats" or "cures"
    • →Show the product clearly — packaging, label, supplement facts
    • →Mention it's a gummy — tactile and approachable
    • →Add disclaimers: "Not medical advice" + "Results may vary"
    • →Use the science, but keep it simple and conversational
    • →Mention it works for both men and women
    • →Stack benefits (sleep + energy + mood) for broader appeal

    ❌ Avoid This

    • →Words: "cures", "treats", "prevents", "diagnoses"
    • →Words: "testosterone booster", "sexual enhancer", "fat burner"
    • →Before/after body transformation visuals
    • →Showing someone ingesting the gummy on camera
    • →Direct mental health claims (anxiety, depression, ADHD)
    • →Promising overnight or guaranteed results
    • →Comparing negatively to prescription medications

    ⚠️ Violations Are Costing Creators Their Accounts

    TikTok is aggressively banning health supplement content. Know exactly what triggers violations, what gets you shadowbanned, and how to protect your account — before you post.
